1.solution:
Skip first 5 (avg 32): (NA‚ąí160)/(N‚ąí5)=A+2 ‚Üí 2N‚ąí5A=‚ąí150. Skip last 5 (avg 40): (NA‚ąí200)/(N‚ąí5)=A‚ąí2 ‚Üí 5A+2N=210.
‚Üí Add equations: 4N=60 ‚Üí N=15.
Answer: 15.

2.solution:
Total=410. After 4 marks sum divisible by 4: (410‚ąím5) mod 4=0 ‚Üí m5 mod 4=2 ‚Üí m5‚ąą{78,82}. Testing m5=82: need m4 with m4 mod 3=1 ‚Üí only 73 works from {73,78,84,93}.
‚Üí 4th+5th entered = m4+m5 = 73+82 = 155.
Answer: D (155).

3.solution:
Before Field Theory: k tests, avg M. (kM+85)/(k+1)=M+3.75 ‚Üí 85‚ąíM=3.75(k+1). With k=3: M=70.
‚Üí After Field Theory: 4 tests, avg=73.75, total=295. Network analysis score S=78.75. Total after 5 tests=373.75.
‚Üí After Fluid Mechanics (80): avg=(373.75+80)/6=75.6‚Čą76.
Answer: 76.

5.solution:
Avg=(179+X)/5. Constraint: 55<(179+X)/5<62 ‚Üí 275<179+X<310 ‚Üí 96<X<131.
Also X>avg ‚Üí X>(179+X)/5 ‚Üí 4X>179 ‚Üí X>44.75 (satisfied for X‚Č•97).
‚Üí X‚ąą{97,98,‚Ä¶,130} ‚Üí 34 values.
Answer: 34.

6.solution:
Let N be total donors. 30% give 800 each = 60% of total T: 0.3N√ó800=0.6T ‚Üí T=400N.
‚Üí Remaining 70% must cover 40% of T=160N.
‚Üí Their avg = 160N/(0.7N) = 160/0.7 ‚Čą 228.57 ‚Čą 229.
Answer: 229.

7.solution:
5 numbers, mean=6 (total=30), median=6 (3rd value=6), only mode=9 (appears twice).
‚Üí Sorted: a‚Č§b‚Č§6‚Č§9‚Č§9. Sum: a+b=30‚ąí6‚ąí9‚ąí9=6. No repeats among a,b: (2,4) works.
‚Üí Highest=9, lowest=2. Sum=11 (thousands)=‚āĻ11000.
Answer: A (‚āĻ11000).

8.solution:
10yr ago: 8 members, total=261. After 3yr: total=261+24=285; remove age-65, add newborn ‚Üí 220.
After 3 more yr: 220+24=244; remove age-65, add newborn ‚Üí 179.
Present (4yr later): 179+32=211. Avg=211/8‚Čą26.
Answer: 26.

9.solution:
Total funds=2PQ+72. People=P+Q+1. Avg=P+Q: (2PQ+72)/(P+Q+1)=P+Q ‚Üí 2PQ=S(S+1)‚ąí72 where S=P+Q.
‚Üí S=11: 2PQ=132‚ąí72=60 ‚Üí PQ=30. P+Q=11,PQ=30 ‚Üí P=5,Q=6 ‚úď.
‚Üí Check: (30+30+72)/12=132/12=11=P+Q ‚úď.
Answer: C (11).

10.solution:
Avg after erasing k: (n(n+1)/2‚ąík)/(n‚ąí1)=445/17. Need 17|(n‚ąí1). Try n=52: sum=1378. k=1378‚ąí445√ó3=1378‚ąí1335=43. Check: 1‚Č§43‚Č§52 ‚úď. Verify: 1335/51=445/17 ‚úď.
Answer: A (43).
